name: Coconut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the coconut and sugar.
2. In another bowl, beat together the eggs, evaporated milk, vanilla extract, cinnamon, raisins, and melted butter.
3. Stir this mixture into the grated coconut in the first bowl until combined.
4. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt over the wet ingredients.
5. Mix until smooth.
6. Pour the batter evenly into 2 greased 9-inch loaf pans.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 1 hour, or until a tester inserted comes out clean.
8. Remove from pans and set on wire racks to cool for 10 minutes.
9. Transfer breads to cooling racks to continue cooling.
Store-bought grated coconut will not yield the same moistness as freshly grated coconut.
